rulings.Case Title: TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. ADRIAN WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause For Tro, Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 17, 2013, line 4. Order To Show Cause For Tro, Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction. DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with Court's order directing service of summons, complaint, order and all papers in support of this motion/ex parte application by personal service no later than 4 p.m. November 22, 2013. Proof of service indicates that documents in support of the motion were served by posting on November 22, 2013. No proof of service for summons and complaint. = (501/REQ)
